_comment: Edit this file to add, remove or update fishing spots. Each spot appears as a green marker on the marine page map.

spots.name: Whitegate Pier
spots.notes: Good at dusk on a flooding tide

spots.name: East Shore Mark
spots.notes: Best 2 hours either side of high water

spots.name: Cuskinny Rock
spots.notes: Sheltered from westerly wind; spinning and lure work well

spots.name: Roches Point Rocks
spots.notes: Exposed mark — check conditions before going; excellent in calm weather

spots.name: Ringaskiddy Pier
spots.notes: Night fishing for codling and whiting from October onwards

spots.name: Cobh Promenade
spots.notes: Flounder on the bottom; mullet with bread on top
